text: Adults should do at least 150 to 300 minutes of moderate-intensity aerobic physical activity per week, or at least 75 to 150 minutes of vigorous-intensity activity, or an equivalent combination.
Adults should also do muscle-strengthening activities at moderate or greater intensity that involve all major muscle groups on 2 or more days a week.

Eat a balanced diet based on higher fibre starchy carbohydrates, include plenty of fruit and vegetables, include some dairy or alternatives, beans and pulses, fish, eggs, meat and other protein, and unsaturated oils in small amounts.
Most adults need at least 7 hours of sleep each night. Keep a regular sleep schedule and create a restful environment to improve sleep quality.
Limit sedentary time and replace it with physical activity of any intensity to gain health benefits.
